description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a deploy stage and adds a job named pages. The pages job runs on the default Docker image, executes the shell commands `mkdir .public`, `cp -r * .public`, and `mv .public public`, then publishes the resulting `public/` directory as an artifact. It is configured with `only: - pages` so it runs only for GitLab Pages pipelines. No additional services, variables, caches, or deployment targets are specified.
